description: Reference datasets for .claude/rules/ structural evaluation — frontmatter validity and path-scoping.

cases.description: Rule file with correct YAML frontmatter containing paths array and substantive body content.

input.rule_content:
---
paths:
  - "src/**/*.py"
  - "tests/**/*.py"
---

# Cross-Platform Policy

Use pathlib.Path for all file operations.
Specify encoding="utf-8" for all file I/O.

cases.description: Rule file with frontmatter but no paths glob — applies globally, drift risk.

input.rule_content:
---
---

# Global Rule

This rule has no path scoping.

cases.description: Rule file with paths pointing to non-existent directory — stale reference.

input.rule_content:
---
paths:
  - "legacy/old_module/**"
---

# Legacy Module Policy

Rules for the old module.
